---
title: "test_gravity_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_gravity_empire.ts"
loc: 79
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.63
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 8.08
overall_score: 6.41
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [after](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)
- [getFileGravity](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/gravity_db.js)
- [GitChronograph](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/git_monitor.js)
- [registry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `testRepo`
- `statsDir`
- `testFile`
- `originalGetFileChurn`
- `pennyDbPath`
- `pennyDb`
- `now`
- `i`
- `originalRoot`
- `gravity`
- `testFile`
- `normalizedPath`
- `originalRoot`
- `gravDbPath`
- `gravDb`
- `originalGetFileChurn`
- `gravity`
